name: emnlp-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for EMNLP submissions: venue fit, ACL Rolling Review submission checks, author response, camera-ready, artifacts, reproducibility, appendices, review-and-commitment process, writing style, related work, experiments, and workflow. Grounded in the EMNLP 2026 CFP, the ARR May 2026 cycle, OpenReview groups, and the ACL Anthology, checked on 2026-07-08.
